name: DeepBias: Adaptive In-depth Probing of Social Biases in LVLMs
summary: arXiv:2607.11228v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: While Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) demonstrate remarkable capabilities, they remain highly susceptible to embedded social biases. Existing...
description: arXiv:2607.11228v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: While Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) demonstrate remarkable capabilities, they remain highly susceptible to embedded social biases. Existing bias evaluation protocols predominantly rely on static datasets, which provide only a superficial assessment, as their fixed test cases cannot adaptively evolve to measure the true depth and limits of...
author: Anqi Li, Jie Zhang, Zhongqi Wang, Songkai Xue, Jiahao Wang, Shiguang Shan, Xilin Chen
